raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Box_1 is the darker box and is not claw-graspable due to its 30x30x30 cm size. Its left side is accessible and its right side is blocked by box_2, so a stable two-hand pinch/lift must be set up by approaching from the accessible left/front region while ensuring the end-effectors do not collide with box_2 and that there is enough clearance to slide both hands to opposing lateral faces of box_1.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is securely controlled by both end-effectors in a symmetric lateral grasp and is lifted off the tabletop (picked up) without disturbing box_2 or the cup."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_1 is the darker box and is not claw-graspable due to its 30x30x30 cm size. Its left side is accessible and its right side is blocked by box_2, so a stable two-hand pinch/lift must be set up by approaching from the accessible left/front region while ensuring the end-effectors do not collide with box_2 and that there is enough clearance to slide both hands to opposing lateral faces of box_1.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is securely controlled by both end-effectors in a symmetric lateral grasp and is lifted off the tabletop (picked up) without disturbing box_2 or the cup.
